# live2d-widget vendored assets

Source: https://github.com/stevenjoezhang/live2d-widget

Package: live2d-widgets@1.0.1

License: GPL-3.0. See LICENSE in this directory.

The widget runtime files are bundled locally so pages load the script from this Flask app instead of a CDN. Model files referenced by `waifu-tips.json` still point at their upstream model hosts and should be replaced with locally hosted, license-clear models before production use.
